originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

sanitizedDescription: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 6e2b75740be.c L63: `free(refptr(mod))` = `free(mod[0])` where mod has been aliased through the while-loop (L47-48: mod=module_core(mod)) making it point to freed memory. Known bug (// ERROR at L63: 'dereferencing already freed mod'). PC = CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD=T AND CONFIG_SMP=T — matches exactly the `#if defined(CONFIG_MODULE_UNLOAD) && defined(CONFIG_SMP)` preprocessor condition that guards the refptr malloc (L29-35) and the free(refptr(mod)) at L62-64. PC correctly constrained.
